name: Teenstar Dilemma - The Journey of the Lochmann Twins
original_name: Teenstar Dilemma - Die Reise der Lochmann Zwillinge
overview: Between provincial life in Darmstadt, self-discovery, family issues and pressure to perform, Heiko and Roman try to establish themselves as serious artists with the band HE/RO – and in doing so, find out who they really are when no one is screaming for them anymore.

trailers.title: UNSERE REISE: TEENSTAR DILEMMA | ab 1.11. im ZDF streamen
Fernbeziehung Struggle - Teen Star Dilemma - Episode 1
